title: Molasses Energy Platter
description: A rich, chewy, energizing Turkish dish featuring molasses, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: 1 cup gluten-free oats
ingredients.notes: Rolled or steel-cut are both acceptable.

ingredients.name: Optional: Fresh fruit slices for garnish

instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker according to manufacturer's instructions.
In a measuring cup, combine the oats and molasses. Stir until no lumps remain.
If using nuts, mix them in with the oat-molasses mixture before sealing the pot.
Cook on high pressure for 10 minutes. Natural release for an additional 5 minutes.
Once released, carefully remove lid to prevent steam burns. Let sit for a few minutes to cool slightly.
